changes.value:
The builtin entity.yaml defines `tag.update` (line 79) and `attachment.delete` (line 98) command definitions, but `register_commands()` in swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs does not register implementations for these IDs. The registry test asserts 21 YAML commands but only 19 trait implementations. If `dispatch_command` receives either of these IDs, it will fail with "No implementation for command" at runtime.

Either add stub implementations or remove these definitions from the builtin YAML. Currently the command count mismatch (21 defs vs 19 impls) is a silent gap.

File: swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml:79-106, swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs:20-88
W7: tag.update and attachment.delete YAML defs have no Command trait implementation

Either add stub implementations or remove these definitions from the builtin YAML. Currently the command count mismatch (21 defs vs 19 impls) is a silent gap.
